edit-config.config:
${enet\-name} <#if description?has_content> ${description} </#if> bbf-xponift:olt-v-enet <#if interface\-usage?has_content>
${interface\-usage}
</#if>
${v\-ani\-name} <#if v\-ethernet\-id?has_content> ${v\-ethernet\-id} </#if> <#if slot\-id?has_content || port\-id?has_content>
<#if slot\-id?has_content> ${slot\-id} </#if> <#if port\-id?has_content> ${port\-id} </#if>
</#if>
<#if max\-number\-mac\-addresses\-interface?has_content>
${max\-number\-mac\-addresses\-interface}
</#if> <#if packet\-rate\-policy\-profile\-name?has_content>
${packet\-rate\-policy\-profile\-name}
</#if> <#if olt\-infrastructure\-name?has_content && leaf\-scheduler\-name?has_content>
${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpartition ${leaf\-scheduler\-name}
</#if>
<#if (gemport\-sharing?has_content && gemport\-sharing == true) >
<#if tc0\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM0 ${enet\-name} 0 ${tc0\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc1\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM1 ${enet\-name} 1 ${tc1\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc2\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM2 ${enet\-name} 2 ${tc2\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc3\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM3 ${enet\-name} 3 ${tc3\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc4\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM4 ${enet\-name} 4 ${tc4\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc5\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM5 ${enet\-name} 5 ${tc5\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc6\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM6 ${enet\-name} 6 ${tc6\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc7\-gemport\-id?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM7 ${enet\-name} 7 ${tc7\-gemport\-id} <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if>
</#if> <#if onu\-uniloopdetect\-enable\-flag?has_content || onu\-uniloopdetect\-auto\-shut\-off?has_content || (onu\-template\-enet\-name?has_content)>
${v\-ani\-name} template-common:node-from-template-usage
<#if onu\-uniloopdetect\-enable\-flag?has_content || onu\-uniloopdetect\-auto\-shut\-off?has_content>
<#if onu\-uniloopdetect\-enable\-flag?has_content> ${onu\-uniloopdetect\-enable\-flag} </#if> <#if onu\-uniloopdetect\-auto\-shut\-off?has_content> ${onu\-uniloopdetect\-auto\-shut\-off} </#if>
</#if> <#if onu\-template\-enet\-name?has_content>
${onu\-template\-enet\-name} <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option?has_content && eth\-port\-hw\-option != "veip">
enabled eth-if-speed-${eth\-port\-hw\-option}gb full <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "25"> <#if fec\-flag?has_content> ${fec\-flag} </#if> </#if>
</#if>
</#if> <#if (gemport\-sharing?has_content && gemport\-sharing == true) >
<#if tc0\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc0\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc0\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM0 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM0 </#if> ${tc0\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc1\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc1\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc1\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM1 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM1 </#if> ${tc1\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc2\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc2\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc2\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM2 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM2 </#if> ${tc2\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc3\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc3\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc3\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM3 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM3 </#if> ${tc3\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc4\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc4\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc4\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM4 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM4 </#if> ${tc4\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc5\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc5\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc5\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM5 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM5 </#if> ${tc5\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc6\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc6\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc6\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM6 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM6 </#if> ${tc6\-gemport\-id}
</#if> <#if tc7\-gemport\-id?has_content>
<#if tc7\-gemport\-set\-name?has_content> ${tc7\-gemport\-set\-name}-${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM7 <#else> ${onu\-template\-enet\-name}-GEM7 </#if> ${tc7\-gemport\-id}
</#if>
</#if>
</#if>
